completion: Customer Jane Smith (jane.smith@example.com) reported billing errors on account ACCT-99182. She was charged $499 instead of $49. Phone: (555) 987-6543.

completion: Dear Ms. Smith, we sincerely apologize for the billing error on your account. A refund of $450 has been issued to your credit card ending in 4532.
